validation_queries.description: Check if 'timer sampling' exists in string entries
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rocpd_string WHERE string LIKE '%timer_sampling%';
validation_queries.error_message: 'timer sampling' string not found in rocpd_string

validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rocpd_string WHERE string IS NULL OR TRIM(string) = '';
validation_queries.error_message: Empty or NULL string entries found in view_rocpd_string

validation_queries.description: Check that category column contains more than 1000 'timer_sampling' entries
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM regions WHERE category = 'timer_sampling';
validation_queries.error_message: Less than 1001 'timer_sampling' entries found in category column of regions

validation_queries.description: Verify no NULL or empty values in guid column
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM regions WHERE guid IS NULL OR TRIM(guid) = '';
validation_queries.error_message: NULL or empty guid values found in regions
